name: Prix De France Steak Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill or broil flank steak; allow it to cool, then cut into 2-inch julienne strips.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons olive oil in a skillet. Add lemon juice and sauté mushrooms in the mixture until they are cooked through.
3. Set aside to cool.
4. In a bowl, whisk together the remaining olive oil, wine vinegar, garlic, herbs, mustard, salt, and pepper.
5. Add steak, mushrooms, and sliced onion. Toss everything gently and let the mixture marinate for an hour.
6. Arrange a bed of lettuce on a large platter.
7. Top with the steak-mushroom-onion-vinaigrette.
8. Sprinkle with fresh parsley.
9. Garnish with cherry tomatoes.
